zh.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley是Sir Roger Burley和Mrs. Roger Burley的兒子，於1335年出生在英國賀福爾。他於1360年與Lucy Gilford在英國英格蘭史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1399年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴享年64歲，埋葬在英國賀福爾比利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley是Sir Roger Burley和Mrs. Roger Burley的儿子，于1335年出生在英国賀福爾。他于1360年与Lucy Gilford在英国英格兰史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1399年在英国英格兰史洛普爾卡斯特萊-普爾維爾巴享年64岁，埋葬在英国賀福爾比利。

nameMeanings.name: Burley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places called Burley, for example in Hampshire, Rutland, Shropshire, and Yorkshire, from Old English burh ‘fortified manor, stronghold’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.
Americanized form of Swiss German Bürli: from a diminutive of būr ‘peasant, farmer’ (see Bauer ).

variants.name: Berley
meanings: English (Yorkshire): variant of   Burley  . This surname is now rare in Britain. It may also be a variant of   Birley  .
Americanized form of Swiss German Beerli, Berli, or Berly, and probably also of their South German cognate Behrle or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname. Compare Barley .

variants.name: Birley
meanings: English: habitational name from Birley in Ecclesfield (Yorkshire), East or North Bierley (Yorkshire), or Birley (Derbyshire).

variants.name: Burlew
meanings: Probably a variant of   Burley   1 or 2.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley was born in 1335, in Herefordshire, England as the son of Sir Roger Burley and Mrs. Roger Burley. He married Lucy Gilford in 1360, in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1399, in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Birley, Herefordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley est né en 1335, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, fils de Sir Roger Burley et Mrs. Roger Burley. Il a épousé Lucy Gilford en 1360, à Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1399, à Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Birley, Herefordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley wurde 1335 in Herefordshire, England, als Sohn von Sir Roger Burley und Mrs. Roger Burley geboren. Er hat 1360 in Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Lucy Gilford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1399 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Birley, Herefordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley è nato il nel 1335 nel Herefordshire, England come figlio di Sir Roger Burley e Mrs. Roger Burley. Lui sposato Lucy Gilford nel 1360, nel Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1399, nel Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Birley, Herefordshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burleyは1335年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでSir Roger BurleyとMrs. Roger Burleyの息子として生まれた。1360年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアでLucy Gilfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1399年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアカストレ-プウルバーバトチで64歳で死去し，イギリスハーエフォードシュアイアバーリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley(은)는 1335년 영국 허퍼드실르에서 Sir Roger Burley(와)과 Mrs. Roger Burley의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르에서 Lucy Gilford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 카스틀레-풀버바트치에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 허퍼드실르 비를리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley nasceu em 1335, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra filho de Sir Roger Burley e Mrs. Roger Burley. Ele casou-se com Lucy Gilford em 1360, em Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1399, em Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Birley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley родился в 1335 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия. Его родителей звали Sir Roger Burley и Mrs. Roger Burley. Он женился на женщине по имени Lucy Gilford в 1360 г. в местности шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1399 г. в местности кастле-пулвирбач, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности бирли, хирефордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Sir Roger Burley nació en 1335, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra como hijo de Sir Roger Burley y Mrs. Roger Burley. Se casó con Lucy Gilford en 1360, en Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1399, en Castle-Pulverbatch, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Birley, Herefordshire, Inglaterra.
